lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇਆ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਕਾ ਛੋਡਿ ਚਲਿਆ ਏਕ ਦਿਹਾੜੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aaeaa hukam paarabraham kaa chhodd chaliaa ek dihaarre |2|
lines.english: But when the Order comes from the Supreme Lord God, he departs and leaves in a day. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਮਾਰਉ ਹਉ ਬੰਧਉ ਛੋਡਉ ਮੁਖ ਤੇ ਏਵ ਬਬਾੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: hau maarau hau bandhau chhoddau mukh te ev babaarre |
lines.english: He may proclaim, "I can kill anyone, I can capture anyone, and I can release anyone."

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਬਹੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰਣੈਹਾਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: karam dharam jugat bahu karataa karanaihaar na jaanai |
lines.english: He may perform all sorts of religious rituals and good actions, but he does not know the Creator Lord, the Doer of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਕਰੈ ਆਪਿ ਨ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਤਤੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਪਛਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: aupades karai aap na kamaavai tat sabad na pachhaanai |
lines.english: He teaches, but does not practice what he preaches; he does not realize the essential reality of the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਂਗਾ ਆਇਆ ਨਾਂਗੋ ਜਾਸੀ ਜਿਉ ਹਸਤੀ ਖਾਕੁ ਛਾਨੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naangaa aaeaa naango jaasee jiau hasatee khaak chhaanai |3|
lines.english: Naked he came, and naked he shall depart; he is like an elephant, throwing dust on himself. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਜਨ ਸੁਨਹੁ ਸਭਿ ਮੀਤਾ ਝੂਠਾ ਏਹੁ ਪਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sant sajan sunahu sabh meetaa jhootthaa ehu pasaaraa |
lines.english: O Saints, and friends, listen to me: all this world is false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਸਾਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ॥੪॥੧॥੩੮॥
lines.translit: gur mil naanak naam dhiaaeaa saach naam nisataaraa |4|1|38|
lines.english: Meeting the Guru, O Nanak, I meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord; through the True Name, I am emancipated. ||4||1||38||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਡੂਬੇ ਖਪਿ ਖਪਿ ਮੁਏ ਗਵਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: meree meree kar kar ddoobe khap khap mue gavaaraa |
lines.english: Continually claiming, "Mine, mine", the mortals are drowned; the fools waste away and die.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਆਸਾ ਘਰੁ ੫ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: raag aasaa ghar 5 mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Raag Aasaa, Fifth House, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮ ਮਹਿ ਸੋਈ ਸਗਲ ਜਗਤ ਧੰਧ ਅੰਧ ॥ ਕੋਊ ਜਾਗੈ ਹਰਿ ਜਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhram meh soee sagal jagat dhandh andh | koaoo jaagai har jan |1|
lines.english: The whole world is asleep in doubt; it is blinded by worldly entanglements. How rare is that humble servant of the Lord who is awake and aware. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਮੋਹਨੀ ਮਗਨ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ॥ ਕੋਊ ਤਿਆਗੈ ਵਿਰਲਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mahaa mohanee magan pria preet praan | koaoo tiaagai viralaa |2|
lines.english: The mortal is intoxicated with the great enticement of Maya, which is dearer to him than life. How rare is the one who renounces it. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਆਨੂਪ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤ ਮੰਤ ॥ ਕੋਊ ਲਾਗੈ ਸਾਧੂ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: charan kamal aanoop har sant mant | koaoo laagai saadhoo |3|
lines.english: The Lord's Lotus Feet are incomparably beautiful; so is the Mantra of the Saint. How rare is that holy person who is attached to them. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਜਾਗੇ ਗਿਆਨ ਰੰਗਿ ॥ ਵਡਭਾਗੇ ਕਿਰਪਾ ॥੪॥੧॥੩੯॥
lines.translit: naanak saadhoo sang jaage giaan rang | vaddabhaage kirapaa |4|1|39|
lines.english: O Nanak, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the love of divine knowledge is awakened; The Lord's Mercy is bestowed upon those who are blessed with such good destiny. ||4||1||39||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥ ਅਪਾਰਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਰੇ ਕੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: karan kaaran samarath apaaraa avar naahee re koee |1|
lines.english: You are the Doer, the Cause of causes, All-powerful and Infinite; there is none other than You. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਆਸਾ ਘਰੁ ੬ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: raag aasaa ghar 6 mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Raag Aasaa, Sixth House, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਪਰਵਾਨਾ ਸੂਖੁ ਸਹਜੁ ਮਨਿ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jo tudh bhaavai so paravaanaa sookh sehaj man soee |
lines.english: Whatever pleases You is acceptable to me; that alone brings peace and ease to my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਜਨ ਰਸਕਿ ਰਸਕਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: tere jan rasak rasak gun gaaveh |
lines.english: Your humble servants sing Your Glorious Praises with enthusiasm and love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਸਲਤਿ ਮਤਾ ਸਿਆਣਪ ਜਨ ਕੀ ਜੋ ਤੂੰ ਕਰਹਿ ਕਰਾਵਹਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: masalat mataa siaanap jan kee jo toon kareh karaaveh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: That alone is good advice, wisdom and cleverness for Your humble servant, which You do or cause to be done. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਤੁਮਾਰਾ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam tumaaraa piaare saadhasang ras paaeaa |
lines.english: Your Name is Ambrosial Nectar, O Beloved Lord; in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I have obtained its sublime essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਅਘਾਇ ਸੇਈ ਜਨ ਪੂਰੇ ਸੁਖ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਗਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tripat aghaae seee jan poore sukh nidhaan har gaaeaa |2|
lines.english: Those humble beings are satisfied and fulfilled, singing the Praises of the Lord, the treasure of peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਟੇਕ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੀ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਨਾਹੀ ਚਿੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau ttek tumaaree suaamee taa kau naahee chintaa |
lines.english: One who has Your Support, O Lord Master, is not afflicted by anxiety.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਦਇਆ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ਹੋਈ ਸੇ ਸਾਹ ਭਲੇ ਭਗਵੰਤਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jaa kau deaa tumaaree hoee se saah bhale bhagavantaa |3|
lines.english: One who is blessed by Your Kind Mercy, is the best, the most fortunate king. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮ ਮੋਹ ਧ੍ਰੋਹ ਸਭਿ ਨਿਕਸੇ ਜਬ ਕਾ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bharam moh dhroh sabh nikase jab kaa darasan paaeaa |
lines.english: Doubt, attachment, and deceit have all disappeared, since I obtained the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰਤਣਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੁ ਕੀਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੇ ਰੰਗਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੧॥੪੦॥
lines.translit: varatan naam naanak sach keenaa har naame rang samaaeaa |4|1|40|
lines.english: Dealing in the Naam, O Nanak, we become truthful, and in the Love of the Lord's Name, we are absorbed. ||4||1 | 40||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੀ ਮਲੁ ਧੋਵੈ ਪਰਾਈ ਆਪਣਾ ਕੀਤਾ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam kee mal dhovai paraaee aapanaa keetaa paavai |
lines.english: He washes off the filth of other peoples' incarnations, but he obtains the rewards of his own actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਈਹਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਹੀ ਦਰਗਹ ਢੋਈ ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਜਾਇ ਪਚਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eehaa sukh nahee daragah dtoee jam pur jaae pachaavai |1|
lines.english: He has no peace in this world, and he has no place in the Court of the Lord. In the City of Death, he is tortured. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹੁਚਿ ਨ ਸਾਕੈ ਕਾਹੂ ਬਾਤੈ ਆਗੈ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pahuch na saakai kaahoo baatai aagai tthaur na paaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He cannot succeed in anything, and in the world hereafter, he finds no place at all. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦਕਿ ਅਹਿਲਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: nindak ahilaa janam gavaaeaa |
lines.english: The slanderer loses his life in vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਤੁ ਪਇਆ ਨਿੰਦਕ ਬਪੁਰੇ ਕਾ ਕਿਆ ਓਹੁ ਕਰੈ ਬਿਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kirat peaa nindak bapure kaa kiaa ohu karai bichaaraa |
lines.english: Such is the fate of the wretched slanderer - what can the poor creature do?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹਾ ਬਿਗੂਤਾ ਜਹ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਰਾਖੈ ਓਹੁ ਕਿਸੁ ਪਹਿ ਕਰੇ ਪੁਕਾਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tahaa bigootaa jeh koe na raakhai ohu kis peh kare pukaaraa |2|
lines.english: He is ruined there, where no one can protect him; with whom should he lodge his complaint? ||2||
